$comment: VENDORED SNAPSHOT of the C# reference named-flag / quirk / preset / listener inventory, extracted from packet-net/packet.net src/Packet.Core + src/Packet.Ax25. This is the C# side of the pico-node parity contract, checked in so scripts/parity-check.mjs runs on a self-hosted runner with NO cross-repo token. Refresh it when the C# inventory changes — see parity/README.md. Each item is either mapped to an opted-in manifest vector_set (coverage) OR must be listed in parity-exceptions.json with a reason; the checker fails on any item that is neither.

source.extraction: regex-over-source, mirroring ax25-ts scripts/parity-check.mjs: `public bool X { get;` flags, `public static <Type> X { get;` presets, `public T X { get;` listener options within the Ax25ListenerOptions class body, `public (async)? T X(` methods + `public event T X;` events within the Ax25Listener class body.

coverageLegend.coverage: { set: <manifest vector_set name>, capability?: <capability that set must declare> } — the item is covered iff that set is in=true (and, when a capability is named, that set declares it).
coverageLegend.unmapped: an item with no `coverage` MUST appear in parity-exceptions.json (inventoryExceptions[section][name]) with a reason, or the checker fails.

items.name: AllowEmptyCallsignBase
items.note: AX.25 address-slot parse leniency; exercised by mod-8 frame vectors.

items.name: AllowInfoOnSupervisoryFrames
items.note: S-frame trailing-info acceptance; mod-8 frame parse.

items.name: AllowCommandFrameAsResponse
items.note: v1.x C-bit leniency on SABM/SABME/DISC; mod-8 frame parse.

items.name: Strict
items.note: Parse-option preset over the AX.25 frame parser.

items.name: Lenient
items.note: Parse-option preset over the AX.25 frame parser.

items.name: Bpq
items.note: Peer-specific parse preset (BPQ).

items.name: Xrouter
items.note: Peer-specific parse preset (Xrouter).

items.name: Direwolf
items.note: Peer-specific parse preset (Direwolf).

items.name: SegmentFirstCarriesL3Pid
items.note: Connected-mode segmentation/reassembly PID placement.

items.name: Ax25Spec38SrejSelectiveRetransmit
items.note: SREJ selective retransmit.

items.name: Ax25Spec40DiscardOutOfWindowIFrames
items.note: Connected-mode I-frame window handling.

items.name: Ax25Spec41KarnSrtSampling
items.note: T1/RTT (Karn) timer sampling in connected mode.

items.name: Ax25Spec42SrejTargetsGap
items.note: SREJ gap-targeting behaviour.

items.name: Ax25Spec43DlFlowOffEntersBusy
items.note: DL-flow-off -> RNR/busy connected-mode behaviour.

items.name: Ax25Spec44Mod128ConnectRoutesToV22
items.note: Mod-128 (SABME) connect routing / v2.2 selection.

items.name: Ax25Spec45FrmrFallbackReestablishesV20
items.note: FRMR fallback re-establishes as v2.0 (mod-8): a negotiate-down.

items.name: Ax25Spec48DmRejectionDegradesToV20
items.note: DM rejection degrades v2.2 -> v2.0 (mod-8): a negotiate-down.

items.name: Ax25Spec47TimerRecoveryDrainAdvancesVR
items.note: Timer-recovery drain advances V(R); connected mode.

items.name: Ax25Spec9AckProgressResetsRc
items.note: Ack progress resets retry counter; connected mode.

items.name: Ax25Spec13ClampSrejWindowToHalfModulus
items.note: Clamp SREJ outstanding window to half the modulus.

items.name: Default
items.note: Session-quirks preset over connected-mode behaviour.

items.name: StrictlyFaithful
items.note: Session-quirks preset over connected-mode behaviour.

items.name: AllowGroupLengthOverrun
items.note: XID Group-Length overrun leniency.

items.name: AllowTruncatedParameter
items.note: XID truncated trailing-parameter leniency.

items.name: MyCall
items.note: Connected-mode session identity; drives address fields.

items.name: T1V
items.note: T1 timer value; connected-mode timing behaviour.

items.name: T2
items.note: T2 timer value; connected-mode timing behaviour.

items.name: T3
items.note: T3 timer value; connected-mode timing behaviour.

items.name: N2
items.note: N2 retry count; connected-mode behaviour.

items.name: K
items.note: Window size K; connected-mode behaviour (mod-8/mod-128).

items.name: ParseOptions
items.note: Passthrough of Ax25ParseOptions into the frame parser.

items.name: Quirks
items.note: Passthrough of Ax25SessionQuirks into the session FSM.

items.name: PreferExtendedConnect
items.note: Chooses SABME (mod-128) vs SABM (mod-8) on connect.

items.name: PreConnectXidNegotiatesSrej
items.note: Pre-connect XID negotiation of SREJ capability.

items.name: ConnectAsync
items.note: Connected-mode establishment (SABM/SABME -> UA).

items.name: SendUiAsync
items.note: UI-frame transmit; mod-8 frame codec.

items.name: SendTestAsync
items.note: TEST-frame transmit; mod-8 frame codec.

items.name: SendData
items.note: Connected-mode I-frame data transmit.
